functions.code:
const mapRow = (o) => ({
    id: String(o.id),
    customerUid: String(o.customer_id),
    phone: o.phone || '',
    status: o.status,
    totalAmount: Number(o.total_amount || 0),
    address: addressToText(o.address) || '',
    paymentMethod: o.payment_mode || 'COD',
    createdAt: Number(o.created_at_ms || 0),
    updatedAt: Number(o.created_at_ms || 0),
    items: Array.isArray(o.items) ? o.items : [],
  });

functions.code:
generateCSPHeader(nonce, isDev = false) {
    const directives = [
      "default-src 'self'",
      "script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://www.gstatic.com https://www.googletagmanager.com",
      "style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com",
      "font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com",
      "img-src 'self' data: https: blob:",
      "connect-src 'self' https://api.meatvo.com wss://api.meatvo.com https://www.google-analytics.com",
      "frame-src 'none'",
      "object-src 'none'",
      "base-uri 'self'",
      "form-action 'self'",
      `script-src 'self' 'nonce-${nonce}' 'unsafe-inline' https://www.gstatic.com https://www.googletagmanager.com`,
      `style-src 'self' 'nonce-${nonce}' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com`,
      "frame-ancestors 'none'",
  // ...

functions.code:
const getEligiblePartners = async (order, excludePartnerId = null) => {
  const target = await getDeliveryTarget(order);
  const { rows } = await query(
    `SELECT dp.id, dp.user_id, dp.current_lat, dp.current_lng, dp.is_online, dp.approved,
            u.name, u.phone
     FROM delivery_partners dp
     JOIN users u ON u.id = dp.user_id
     WHERE dp.is_online = TRUE
       AND dp.approved = TRUE
       AND NOT EXISTS (
         SELECT 1
         FROM order_assignments oa
         JOIN orders o ON o.id = oa.order_id
         WHERE oa.delivery_partner_id = dp.id
           AND o.status NOT IN ('DELIVERED','CANCELLED')
  // ...

patterns.name: Factory
patterns.description: Creates objects without specifying exact class. Enables loose coupling and extensibility.

patterns.name: Observer/Event
patterns.description: Defines a subscription mechanism for event-driven architecture. Great for decoupling.

patterns.name: Higher-Order Component
patterns.description: Functions that take a component and return an enhanced component.

patterns.name: God Object
patterns.description: Files with too many responsibilities (15+ functions). Consider splitting into smaller modules.

patterns.name: Long File
patterns.description: Files over 500 lines are harder to maintain. Consider breaking into smaller modules.

patterns.name: VBA God Module
patterns.description: VBA modules with 20+ procedures. Consider splitting into smaller modules.

suggestions.title: Fix Security Issues
suggestions.action: Address hardcoded secrets, injection risks immediately

suggestions.title: Split Large Files
suggestions.desc: 1 files have too many functions. Split by responsibility.
suggestions.action: Group related functions and extract to separate modules

suggestions.title: Extract Duplicated Code
suggestions.desc: 3 instances of similar code found. DRY principle violation.
suggestions.impact: Reduces maintenance burden and potential bugs

suggestions.title: Fix Architecture Violations
suggestions.desc: 10 layer violations found. Lower layers should not depend on higher layers.

suggestions.title: Reduce Coupling
suggestions.desc: 1 files are imported by many others. Consider if this is intentional.
suggestions.action: Review if these should be split or if importers should be consolidated

suggestions.title: Resolve Naming Conflicts
suggestions.desc: 2 function names are duplicated across files. This can cause confusion.
suggestions.action: Rename functions to be more specific or consolidate into shared module
suggestions.impact: Prevents bugs from importing wrong function

suggestions.title: Add Test Coverage

functionStatistics.code:
generateCSPHeader(nonce, isDev = false) {
    const directives = [
      "default-src 'self'",
      "script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://www.gstatic.com https://www.googletagmanager.com",
      "style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com",
      "font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com",
      "img-src 'self' data: https: blob:",
      "connect-src 'self' https://api.meatvo.com wss://api.meatvo.com https://www.google-analytics.com",
      "frame-src 'none'",
      "object-src 'none'",
      "base-uri 'self'",
      "form-action 'self'",
      `script-src 'self' 'nonce-${nonce}' 'unsafe-inline' https://www.gstatic.com https://www.googletagmanager.com`,
      `style-src 'self' 'nonce-${nonce}' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com`,
      "frame-ancestors 'none'",
  // ...

getEligiblePartners
functionStatistics.code:
const getEligiblePartners = async (order, excludePartnerId = null) => {
  const target = await getDeliveryTarget(order);
  const { rows } = await query(
    `SELECT dp.id, dp.user_id, dp.current_lat, dp.current_lng, dp.is_online, dp.approved,
            u.name, u.phone
     FROM delivery_partners dp
     JOIN users u ON u.id = dp.user_id
     WHERE dp.is_online = TRUE
       AND dp.approved = TRUE
       AND NOT EXISTS (
         SELECT 1
         FROM order_assignments oa
         JOIN orders o ON o.id = oa.order_id
         WHERE oa.delivery_partner_id = dp.id
           AND o.status NOT IN ('DELIVERED','CANCELLED')
  // ...

const getCorsOrigins = () =>
  (process.env.CORS_ORIGINS || '')
    .split(',')
    .map((s) => s.trim())
    .filter(Boolean);

ok
functionStatistics.code:
const ok = (res, data = {}, message = '') =>
  res.status(200).json({ ok: true, success: true, data, message });

functionStatistics.name: created
functionStatistics.code:
const created = (res, data = {}, message = 'Created') =>
  res.status(201).json({ ok: true, success: true, data, message });

functionStatistics.name: fail
functionStatistics.code:
const fail = (res, status, message, data = {}) =>
  res.status(status).json({ ok: false, success: false, error: { message }, data, message });
